[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001000 2
1 100000011 3
2 011101110 6
3 001101111 6
4 000000000 a
5 111111111 a
6 010101111 6
7 100100111 5

01 10 110111111 8
12 21 110101011 6
23 32 111110011 7

45 54 011011111 7
56 65 001100111 5
67 76 101110111 7
70 07 111110111 8

13 31 111111011 8
24 42 111011011 7
35 53 111110111 8
46 64 011111111 8
57 75 101010101 5
60 06 110110111 7
71 17 111111111 a match 5

25 52 101000111 5
36 63 111110111 8
47 74 111011111 8
50 05 111110111 8
61 16 010101111 6 match 6
72 27 101010111 6

37 73 111110110 7
